## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check . --fix && ruff format .` passes (backend)
- [ ] `mypy app/` passes (backend, strict mode)
- [ ] `vue-tsc --noEmit` passes (frontend)
- [ ] `pytest` passes (backend); `npm test` passes (frontend) where relevant
- [ ] Commits are signed off with DCO (`git commit -s`) — required, see `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No AGPL or pre-Apache-2.0 remnants reintroduced
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated if this is a user-visible change
